Toxicological examination
P  80  MNG  PLGA  NPs  &  P  80  PLGA  NPs  (without  drug)  toxicity  examination
was  completed  via  i.n.  route.  No  mortality  was  seen  for  all  groups  of  animals
after the 14 days examinations. Any irritation signs or destruction of tissue cells
were  not  observed  in  the  P  80  PLGA  NPs  (without  drug)  or  normal  control
groups of all brain tissues of animals. The macroscopic examination of brain was
studied  for  P  80  MNG  PLGA  NPs  but  we  have  not  found  any  changes  in  brain
tissue’s morphology and their microstructure. We have also compared the visual
sign  of  necrosis  or  inflammation  of  P  80  MNG  PLGA  NPs  to  control  group  for
the  safety  (Fig.  14).  There  was  no  toxicological  findings  in  terms  of  any  visual
sign of necrosis or inflammation for P 80 MNG PLGA NPs. All the ingredients
were used in this research for the preparation of P 80 MNG PLGA NPs showed
the safety of optimized-NPs and can be proceed in future trials. Now, it is proved
that  opt-P  80  MNG  PLGA  NPs  are  safe.  Finally,  it  is  concluded  that  opt-P  80
MNG PLGA NPs has fit for the future’s trial of clinical examinations.
